LanguageData.DP_Bullet_IG.label: sniper rifle bullet
LanguageData.DP_Bullet_ZeusCannon.label: zeus bullet
LanguageData.DP_Cannonball.label: cannonball
LanguageData.DP_CannonNoEquip.label: cannon
LanguageData.DP_CannonNoEquip.description: A weapon representing an enemy mortar. Not intended for player use.
LanguageData.DP_CannonNoEquip.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.DP_CannonNoEquip.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: cannon
LanguageData.DP_ChainVulcan.label: Chain Vulcan
LanguageData.DP_ChainVulcan.description: An advanced weapon originally designed as a spaceship armament. It has a long warmup phase, but can be fired continuously once charged.
LanguageData.DP_ChainVulcan.tools.barrels.label: barrels
LanguageData.DP_ChainVulcan.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: Chain Vulcan
LanguageData.DP_EtherealBelt.label: Ethereal Belt
LanguageData.DP_EtherealBelt.description:
A worn cloak of lost construction. Allows the user to phase through walls at will through some localized quantum tunneling mumble jumble. Greatly consumes the user's energy reserves to do so.
[Note: requires Vanilla Expanded to work.]
LanguageData.DP_EtherealCloak.label: Ethereal Cloak
LanguageData.DP_EtherealCloak.description: An ancient, threadbear cloak constructed by a long forgotten civilization. The wearer of the cloak becomes invisible, but their ability to interact with this plane of reality becomes limited.
LanguageData.DP_FireCultRobe.label: Fire Cloak
LanguageData.DP_FireCultRobe.description: A full-body garment worn by fire cultists. It gives immense protection of heat. Not intended for player use (unless recruited a fire cultist).
LanguageData.DP_GaiaFury.label: Land's Wrath
LanguageData.DP_GaiaFury.description: A mysterious archotech device that pulsates a primal frequency. Can be activated without limit to drive all nearby untamed animals mad. While mostly harmless to humans, the pulse may also irritate nearby humans temporairly.
LanguageData.DP_GlitchedRing.label: Glitched Belt
LanguageData.DP_GlitchedRing.description: A belt of Ultratech origin that allows the user to warp into locations at well. Without its original owner, the ring has glitched however, causing the user to randomly teleport from place to place.
LanguageData.DP_HolyHandGrenade.label: Holy Hand Grenade of Antioch
LanguageData.DP_HolyHandGrenade.description: ...And Saint Attila raised the hand grenade up on high, saying, "O LORD, bless this Thy hand grenade, that with it Thou mayest blow Thine enemies to tiny bits, in Thy mercy." And the LORD did grin, and the people did feast upon the lambs and sloths and carp and anchovies and orangutans and breakfast cereals, and fruit bats and large chu... [At this point, the friar is urged by Brother Maynard to "skip a bit, brother"]... And the LORD spake, saying, "First shalt thou take out the Holy Pin. Then shalt thou count to three, no more, no less. Three shall be the number thou shalt count, and the number of the counting shall be three. Four shalt thou not count, neither count thou two, excepting that thou then proceed to three. Five is right out! Once the number three, being the third number, be reached, then lobbest thou thy Holy Hand Grenade of Antioch towards thy foe, who, being naughty in My sight, shall snuff it."
LanguageData.DP_InfinityGun.label: Infinity Gun
LanguageData.DP_InfinityGun.description: Standard issue rifle of ultratech snipers. Even without AI combat modules, this rifle can shoot extremely far.
LanguageData.DP_InfinityGun.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.DP_InfinityGun.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.DP_InfinityGun.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: Infinity Gun
LanguageData.DP_InsanityLanceUnequip.label: psychic insanity lance
LanguageData.DP_InsanityLanceUnequip.description: A limited-use psychic effector. It overwhelms the target's mind with terrifying perceptual distortions, driving them into a berserk state. There is a risk of brain damage. It has a long range, but requires line of sight.
LanguageData.DP_LightBeam.label: lightbeam
LanguageData.DP_LightBeam.description: A powerful ultratech weapon that fires an extremely rapid, concentrated stream of bullets at a target.
LanguageData.DP_LightBeam.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.DP_LightBeam.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.DP_LightBeam.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: lightbeam
LanguageData.DP_LightBeamBullet.label: lightbeam
LanguageData.DP_MechSignalArtifact.label: Mech Signaller
LanguageData.DP_MechSignalArtifact.description:
An ancient military targeting device that signals an orbital platform to deploy a random squad of friendly mechanoids.
The device can used indefinitely, though its age causes it to require constant maintenance.
LanguageData.DP_NinjaRobe.label: Ninja Garment
LanguageData.DP_NinjaRobe.description: A robe worn by Ninjas. Not intended for player use.
LanguageData.DP_OrbOfMadness.label: Orb of Madness
LanguageData.DP_OrbOfMadness.description: A cursed orb touched by the void. Peering into the orb at someone causes even the psychically immunue to go insane. However, the orb has been known to sometimes inflict the same madness on its user. The orb occasionally needs to be refuelled with exotic materials.
LanguageData.DP_PandoraBox.label: Pandora's Box
LanguageData.DP_ProjHolyGrenade.label: holy grenade
LanguageData.DP_ProjSunfire.label: sunfire
LanguageData.DP_RareGood.label: Rare Good
LanguageData.DP_RareGood.description: A valuable but fragile item. Each can be sold for a lot of money.
LanguageData.DP_RealityBreaker.label: Realitybreaker
LanguageData.DP_RealityBreaker.description: An artifact imbued with the fury of Gaia. Causes all untamed animals to go into a berserk state. Can be activated infinitely.
LanguageData.DP_RocketNoEquip.label: RocketLauncher
LanguageData.DP_RocketNoEquip.description: A weapon representing a rocket complex. Not intended for player use.
LanguageData.DP_RocketNoEquip.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.DP_RocketNoEquip.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.DP_RocketNoEquip.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: RocketLauncher
LanguageData.DP_ShroudOfMadness.label: Madness Cloak
LanguageData.DP_ShroudOfMadness.description: A cloak that allows you to phase through walls through some localized quantum tunneling mumble jumble. Walking through walls however drastically increases the user's hunger.
LanguageData.DP_SolarGuidance.label: Blessing of the Sun
LanguageData.DP_SolarGuidance.description: This pawn has the blessing of a mysterious power. They can shoot powerful flames from their hands.
LanguageData.DP_SolarGuidance.tools.barrels.label: barrels
LanguageData.DP_SolarGuidance.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: Blessing of the Sun
LanguageData.DP_SolarRadiance.label: Radiance of the Sun
LanguageData.DP_SolarRadiance.description: A massive weapon capable of blanketing entire towns with flames.
LanguageData.DP_SolarRadiance.tools.barrels.label: barrels
LanguageData.DP_SolarRadiance.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: Radiance of the Sun
LanguageData.DP_ThorHammer.label: Thorhammer
LanguageData.DP_ThorHammer.description: A warhammer with an embedded ultratech device that summons lightning strikes on impact. The warhammer shields the user from some of the impact of the flames.
LanguageData.DP_ThorHammer.tools.handle.label: handle
LanguageData.DP_ThorHammer.tools.head.label: head
LanguageData.DP_ZeusCannon.label: Zeus Cannon
LanguageData.DP_ZeusCannon.description: An advanced ultratech weapon capable of launching a rapid volley of terrifying lightning bolts.
LanguageData.DP_ZeusCannon.tools.grip.label: grip
LanguageData.DP_ZeusCannon.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: Zeus Cannon
